summary: P6 re-review passed. Backend OpenAPI accessKey errors now match the frozen contract, frontend build and contract synchronization pass, OpenAPI negative assertions were strengthened, and validator reports pass. Remaining items are P2 production-hardening risks and do not block current MVP phase acceptance.

evidence: docs/build/frontend-clean-build.md records npm.cmd ci and npm.cmd run build pass

frontend/src/api/enums.ts and frontend/src/api/types.ts match the 19 frozen DynamicFieldType values
docs/build/contract-sync-check.md records field type enum pass
OpenApiSecurityServiceImplTest asserts missing and unknown accessKey errors
OpenApiSecurityServiceImplTest covers accessKey, timestamp, body hash, signature, scope and rate limit error codes

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Current smoke covers same-process conflict, but production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
Core OpenAPI error-code matrix is now covered. OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, OpenAPI idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended上线前专项.
